slot-locations.answer: All regions (home hero, about bg, blog header, nav accent, footer art, 404 page) but phased — start with home-hero end-to-end, then expand.
slot-locations.note: Phased: Phase 1 = home-hero. Phase 2 = about-bg + blog-header. Phase 3 = all remaining.

novelty-pressure.answer: Balanced — mostly refine winners, weekly wildcard variant for surprise.

initial-generators.answer: All generators available. Liminal decides what works best.

engagement-goals.answer: Dwell time (>10s), scroll depth, click/touch interaction, bounce rate (inverse).

first-slot-urgency.answer: One slot end-to-end first (home-hero), then expand.
